Translate.cfg_hotkey_fcs_desc: Toggle the FCS panel display on/off.
Translate.cfg_hotkey_env_desc: Toggle the Environment panel display on/off.
Translate.cfg_hotkey_clear_desc: Unlock the target and clear distance data.
Translate.cfg_hotkey_track_desc: Track the target and calculate distance data.
Translate.cfg_calc_scale_desc: Determines the visual size of the 3D impact marker.
Translate.cfg_hud_left_x_desc: Absolute distance of the entire HUD from the left side of the screen.
Translate.cfg_hud_left_y_desc: Y-axis offset of the entire HUD relative to the center of the screen.
Translate.cfg_hud_left_scale_desc: Global UI scaling factor for all panels.
Translate.cfg_hud_right_x_desc: Absolute distance of the entire HUD from the right side of the screen.
Translate.cfg_hud_right_y_desc: Y-axis offset of the entire HUD relative to the center of the screen.
Translate.cfg_hud_right_scale_desc: Global UI scaling factor for all panels.
Translate.cfg_hud_rb_ui_desc: Make your HUD panels look cool like a rainbow!
Translate.cfg_hud_rb_spd_desc: Controls the color cycling speed of the Rainbow UI.
Translate.cfg_fcs_x_desc: Independent X-axis offset for the FCS panel.
Translate.cfg_fcs_y_desc: Independent Y-axis offset for the FCS panel.
Translate.cfg_fcs_scale_desc: Independent scaling factor for the FCS panel.
Translate.cfg_fcs_active_desc: Enable or disable the FCS panel rendering.
Translate.cfg_fcs_color_desc: Customize the UI color of the FCS panel.
Translate.cfg_env_x_desc: Independent X-axis offset for the Environment panel.
Translate.cfg_env_y_desc: Independent Y-axis offset for the Environment panel.
Translate.cfg_env_scale_desc: Independent scaling factor for the Environment panel.
Translate.cfg_env_active_desc: Enable or disable the Environment panel rendering.
Translate.cfg_env_color_desc: Customize the UI color of the Environment panel.
Translate.cfg_health_x_desc: Independent X-axis offset for the Health panel.
Translate.cfg_health_y_desc: Independent Y-axis offset for the Health panel.
Translate.cfg_health_scale_desc: Independent scaling factor for the Health panel.
Translate.cfg_health_active_desc: Enable or disable the Biometric Health panel rendering.
Translate.cfg_health_color_desc: Customize the UI color of the Health panel.
Translate.cfg_buff_x_desc: Independent X-axis offset for the Active Buff panel.
Translate.cfg_buff_y_desc: Independent Y-axis offset for the Active Buff panel.
Translate.cfg_buff_scale_desc: Independent scaling factor for the Active Buff panel.
Translate.cfg_buff_active_desc: Enable or disable the Active Buff panel rendering.
Translate.cfg_buff_color_desc: Customize the UI color of the Active Buff panel.
Translate.cfg_hud_top_y_desc: Initial distance of the top panels from the edge of the screen.
Translate.cfg_hud_top_scale_desc: Global UI scaling factor for all top panels.
Translate.cfg_hud_top_space_desc: Vertical spacing between stacked top panels.
Translate.cfg_team_x_desc: Independent X-axis offset for the Team panel.
Translate.cfg_team_y_desc: Independent Y-axis offset for the Team panel.
Translate.cfg_team_scale_desc: Independent scaling factor for the Team panel.
Translate.cfg_team_active_desc: Enable or disable the squad biometric status display.
Translate.cfg_team_color_desc: Default text color for the Team panel.
Translate.cfg_throw_y_desc: Vertical fine-tuning offset for the Throwable panel.
Translate.cfg_throw_scale_desc: Independent scaling factor for the Throwable panel.
Translate.cfg_throw_active_desc: Enable or disable the available ordnance display.
Translate.cfg_throw_align_desc: Horizontal alignment of the text within the Throwable panel.
Translate.cfg_throw_color_desc: Warning/Ordnance color for the Throwable panel.
Translate.cfg_weap_y_desc: Vertical fine-tuning offset for the Weapon panel.
Translate.cfg_weap_scale_desc: Independent scaling factor for the Weapon panel.
Translate.cfg_weap_active_desc: Enable or disable the weapon fire-control display.
Translate.cfg_weap_color_desc: Default tactical UI color for the Weapon panel.
Translate.cfg_hud_oc_ui_desc: Override all HUD elements with a single custom color.
Translate.cfg_hud_oc_clr_desc: Choose the color used for the global override.
Translate.cfg_hud_shdw_clr_desc: Customize the color of the text drop shadows.
Translate.cfg_hud_shdw_ofst_x_desc: Horizontal pixel offset for text shadows.
Translate.cfg_hud_shdw_ofst_y_desc: Vertical pixel offset for text shadows.
Translate.cfg_hud_pure_ui_desc: Strip all native warning colors (red/orange/green) and force a strict monochrome HUD.
Translate.cfg_hotkey_draw_desc: Hotkey to quickly show or hide the entire tactical HUD overlay.
Translate.cfg_hud_draw_ui_desc: Master switch to enable or disable the entire HUD rendering.
Translate.cfg_buff_rect_desc: Horizontal width constraint for the Active Buff panel.
Translate.cfg_env_rect_desc: Horizontal width constraint for the Environment panel.
Translate.cfg_fcs_rect_desc: Horizontal width constraint for the FCS panel.
Translate.cfg_health_rect_desc: Horizontal width constraint for the Biometric Health panel.
Translate.cfg_throw_rect_desc: Horizontal width constraint for the Throwable ordnance panel.
Translate.cfg_team_rect_desc: Horizontal width constraint for the Squad Biometrics panel.
Translate.cfg_boss_x_desc: Independent X-axis offset for the Boss Tracker panel.
Translate.cfg_boss_y_desc: Independent Y-axis offset for the Boss Tracker panel.
Translate.cfg_boss_scale_desc: Independent scaling factor for the Boss Tracker panel.
Translate.cfg_boss_active_desc: Enable or disable the Hostile Boss Tracker display.
Translate.cfg_boss_color_desc: Default warning color for the Boss Tracker panel.
Translate.cfg_boss_rect_desc: Horizontal width constraint for the Boss Tracker panel.
